title: Device Home Screen - Default Quick Settings
scenario: Device Home Screen quick settings do not match the first three options from Device Settings screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the three quick settings displayed below the device image.
Tap on the device image or name to enter Device Settings.
Observe the order of options in the Device Settings screen.
Compare the first three options in Device Settings with the three quick settings shown on the Home screen.
expected: The three quick settings displayed on the Home screen match the first three options from the Device Settings screen, in the same order.
